ksa_text: Establish and operate data and AI governance committees, including charter development, membership selection, decision authority definition, meeting cadence management, accountability structure design, and oversight operation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of providers of high-risk AI systems

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
